creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 245779
patch to 1.15.4

Changelog: https://github.com/libpinyin/ibus-libpinyin/releases

1.15.4:

* Use libsoup3
* Update network dictionary
* Fix Caps Lock for English mode

1.15.3:

* bug fixes


Notice that libsoup/libsoup3 is only used for cloud input, which is not enabled in this port, so that does not matter.
Also, the last patch seems to be not needed. Removed it. Now this port has no patch.
